creator: bcr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 185753
icinga build failure output

I'm trying to build icinga2 port version 2.7.0 on a Raspberry Pi 3, since there is no package on arm64 yet. I'm using the RaspBSD image FreeBSD-aarch64-12.0-GENERIC-320146M.img from their website. I've deselected DOCS and PGSQL (the latter is not available on arm64 either and throws a different error) in the port options. The error message from the build is attached.
